wordplay_note: A man of the harvest returning to a corrupted garden
card_description: Ted Barton (meaning "Barton = barley settlement") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Cosmic Puppets*. Man who returns to his hometown to find it completely changed by warring cosmic forces. Name note: A man of the harvest returning to a corrupted garden. The hometown transformed — Zoroastrian good and evil remaking small-town America. First appears in *The Cosmic Puppets*.

reference.brief: Man who returns to his hometown to find it completely changed by warring cosmic forces
reference.significance: The hometown transformed — Zoroastrian good and evil remaking small-town America
